scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @server-codex/api & npm run dev -w @server-codex/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @server-codex/api && npm run build -w @server-codex/runner && npm run build -w @server-codex/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @server-codex/api && npm run typecheck -w @server-codex/runner && npm run typecheck -w @server-codex/web
